  "sql": "SELECT ca_state, d_year, SUM(revenue) as combined_revenue FROM (SELECT ca.ca_state, d.d_year, SUM(ss.ss_net_paid_inc_tax) as revenue FROM store_sales ss JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk GROUP BY ca.ca_state, d.d_year UNION ALL SELECT ca.ca_state, d.d_year, SUM(cs.cs_net_paid_inc_tax) as revenue FROM catalog_sales cs JOIN customer c ON cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk GROUP BY ca.ca_state, d.d_year UNION ALL SELECT ca.ca_state, d.d_year, SUM(ws.ws_net_paid_inc_ship_tax) as revenue FROM web_sales ws JOIN customer c ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk GROUP BY ca.ca_state, d.d_year) GROUP BY ca_state, d_year ORDER BY ca_state, d_year",
